(2) Write the transfer function of the compensating element.

(2) Write the transfer function of the compensating element.
raw_answer_text: (1) The system used a lag compensator. (2) The transfer function of the compensating element is \( G_c(s) = \frac{s + 1}{\frac{1}{0.013}s + 1} \).
